description: Max-Cut on a 6-node graph with edges (0,1),(0,2),(1,3),(2,3),(2,4),(3,5),(4,5). The graph is bipartite, so all 7 edges can be cut.

variables.name: x_0
variables.description: Node 0 in group B (vs A when 0)

test_instance.description: Cut value per edge (i,j) is x_i + x_j - 2*x_i*x_j (= 1 iff the endpoints differ). Optimum: assign A={0,3,4} and B={1,2,5} (or its complement). All 7 edges cross.
